page: Vultr vcg-l40s-128c-1500g-384vram is a high-density GPU-accelerated server instance within the Cloud GPU family. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel CPU with 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core on a shared allocation model. The system is equipped with 1500.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 11.72 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, this instance bundles eight NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing a combined total of 384 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 3400 GB NVMe SSD, and the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of eight enterprise-grade GPUs paired with a substantial 1500.0 GB memory footprint offers a consolidated platform for resource-intensive workloads, reducing the need for multi-node clustering. This hardware profile is engineered for demanding workloads such as large language model inference, generative AI, deep learning training, high-fidelity 3D rendering, and complex data science pipelines.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-128c-1500g-384vram is a high-density GPU-accelerated server designed for intensive computational workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor, it provides 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs under a shared allocation model. The system features 1500.0 GB of system memory, translating to 11.72 GB of RAM per core. Graphics and parallel processing power are driven by eight bundled NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a total of 384 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by a local 3400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This configuration offers high resource density, making it qualitatively cost-effective for consolidating massive parallel workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale artificial intelligence workloads, deep learning training, large language model inference, and complex data science simulations.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-128c-1500g-384vram is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 128 Intel cores, 1500 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 384 GB VRAM, and 3400 GB NVMe SSD storage for demanding AI and deep learning workloads.
